====''Pokémon the Series''====
Silver's only appearance in {{aniseries|PTS}} was a brief cameo in the [[A New Oath|original Japanese opening]] of ''[[The Legend of Thunder!]]''. In this opening, he was shown defeating {{jo|Jimmy}} with his {{p|Nidoking}}, only to be defeated later on when Jimmy's {{p|Cyndaquil}} fully evolved into {{TP|Jimmy|Typhlosion}}.
